Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Jiangsu Datang Electric.

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Datang Electric Power Equipment Co., Ltd. presents a clear case of an asset-light electrical engineering contractor and distributor operating under the guise of a manufacturer. Despite a registered capital of 6 million RMB and an official classification as an 'Electrical Machinery Manufacturer', the company reported only 6 insured employees in 2024. A team of 6 is entirely insufficient to operate a manufacturing line for high/low voltage complete switchgears or cable production. Its name, 'Datang' (often associated with state-owned power giants), combined with its 'natural person' ownership, suggests it is an independent micro-contractor likely leveraging a 'big brand' sounding name to secure local bids. Its core actual operations revolve around the 'design and construction of power transmission and transformation engineering' and the wholesale/online sales of electrical components and building materials.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 73)
Operational Status: ACTIVE (ON PAPER) / ASSET-LIGHT ENGINEERING CONTRACTOR
